name: frame
description: Frame-space skills — the 'what' of work. Each skill takes an unstructured situation and helps the user see, articulate, reframe, validate, pressure-test, or translate the problem before any approach is chosen. AI as perceptual lever, not generator. Find-frame family (v0.1.0): probe (with Mode B validation), from-corpus, problem-statement, jtbd, lens, scope, stakes, reframe. Finish-frame family (v0.2.0): devil (adversarial pressure-test), audience-pivot (frame×audience matrix). Plus composer (meta-skill, picks and sequences with bidirectional checkpoint to /approach). Pairs with the /approach plugin to close the loop: problem → frame → approach → solution. See ARCHITECTURE.md.
